criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence for music creation or enhancement.

criteria.name: User Accessibility
criteria.description: Ease of use for individuals without formal music training.

criteria.name: Customization Options
criteria.description: The range of features allowing users to tailor music outputs to their preferences.

criteria.name: Output Quality
criteria.description: The overall quality and professionalism of the music produced.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: The number of platforms (e.g., iOS, Android, Web) on which the app is available.
